positive: A symmetrical, detailed illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna forming an enclosed, ornate portal structure. The central element features stylized mandalas incorporating deep indigo blues, glowing emerald greens, and rich gold accents. Highly detailed symmetrical composition suitable for a central apparel print. The style should be neo-traditional botanical tattoo flash mixed with ethereal cosmic sci-fi elements. Use clean silhouettes, strong vector lines, deep contrasting shadows, and soft glow accents. Cinematic lighting, clean white background for maximum print contrast, graphic novel quality, high resolution, Art Deco influence.
